No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: The weekly topic '藥物及食品安全評估' (Drug and food safety assessment) directly aligns with Target 2.1, ensuring access to safe food.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The entire course focuses on health, covering drug abuse (Target 3.5), environmental toxins (Target 3.9), and treatment for diseases like cardiovascular issues (Target 3.4). This is the core SDG.
evidence: 藥物(物質)濫用對身心之危害

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and educates students on drug safety and health risks, promoting health literacy for sustainable development (Target 4.7).
evidence: 教導學生正確使用藥品及用藥安全
Teach students correct use of drugs and drug safety

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course introduces '醫藥科技知識' (medical technology knowledge) and aims to help students '了解科技研發進程' (understand technological R&D progress), aligning with Target 9.5 on enhancing scientific research and innovation.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course content relates to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The topic '環境毒物與健康風險' (environmental toxins and health risks) can be inferred to relate to reducing the adverse environmental impact of communities, as per Target 11.6.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course addresses '環境毒物與健康風險' (environmental toxins and health risks), directly linking to Target 12.4. Education on '正確使用藥品及用藥安全' (correct use of drugs and drug safety) promotes responsible consumption.
evidence: 教導學生正確使用藥品及用藥安全

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course mentions that '不當的藥物濫用會...造成諸多的社會問題' (improper drug abuse causes numerous social problems), which can be weakly inferred to relate to reducing violence and crime (Targets 16.1, 16.4).
